description: Judge seat of the adversarial (dialectic) PR review (#1222): rules charge-by-charge on the presented record — the change's stated intent, code excerpts, the prosecution's charges, and the defense's answers. Deliberately tool-less (advocates gather evidence; the judge weighs what is presented — keeps the potentially expensive seat cheap, bounded, and auditable) and deliberately no output_schema (the contract is reason-freely-then-one-fenced-JSON-block, so reasoning-capable models keep their reasoning room; a JSON-only grammar suppresses it).
